records.title: parser option handling investigation
records.text_summary: Click parser investigation note. The parser option handling path ultimately flows through add_to_parser in src/click/core.py. Noise: historical benchmark notes mention unrelated shell completion experiments, archived release cleanup, and stale CI failures that are no longer relevant. The practical file focus is still src/click/core.py plus the parser regression coverage in tests/test_parser.py and tests/test_options.py. The executor should ignore old shell completion chatter and keep the review centered on parser option handling.

records.title: parser regression tests
records.text_summary: Regression note for parser option handling. The required test coverage lives in tests/test_parser.py and tests/test_options.py. Noise: old snapshots mention unrelated decorators, envvar docs, and shell completion migrations. For this task the stable facts are that src/click/core.py contains the implementation path, add_to_parser is the function to inspect, and tests/test_parser.py with tests/test_options.py are the focused verification targets.

records.title: planner checklist for parser option changes
records.text_summary: Planner checklist. Before changing parser option behavior, inspect add_to_parser in src/click/core.py, confirm which option paths are covered by tests/test_parser.py, and verify cross-option behavior in tests/test_options.py. Noise: archived incidents reference docs build failures, wheel metadata cleanup, and shell completion regressions, but those are not part of this change. The planner should keep a tight scope around src/click/core.py, tests/test_parser.py, tests/test_options.py, and add_to_parser.

records.title: distilled parser evidence
records.text_summary: Distilled evidence: parser option handling should focus on src/click/core.py, tests/test_parser.py, tests/test_options.py, and the add_to_parser path.

records.title: parser option handling fact
records.text_summary: Stable fact: parser option handling work in Click should inspect add_to_parser in src/click/core.py and validate changes with tests/test_parser.py plus tests/test_options.py.

cases.query_text: Which implementation file and focused tests should I inspect for parser option handling in Click?
What function and tests define the parser option handling path in this Click task?
